tools.name: run_shell
tools.description: Execute a shell command locally (or via SSH to target host if --target-host was set). Use for benchmarks, environment checks, container ops. Bounded by timeout.

tools.name: http_get
tools.description: Fetch a URL and return its body (truncated to 1 MiB). Use for HuggingFace model cards, vLLM docs, GitHub issue pages, blog posts, leaderboard pages.

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read a local file from this repository (frameworks, prompts, prior artifacts). Use to load framework markdown as additional in-context guidance.

tools.name: write_artifact
tools.description: Write a text artifact into the agent run directory. Use to persist evaluation-report.md, framework-scores.json, research-citations.md, etc. Path is relative to evaluation-runs/<ts>/ — do not include '..'.

name.description: Relative path inside the run directory (e.g. 'evaluation-report.md')

tools.name: check_gpu
tools.description: Run nvidia-smi and parse compute capability / memory / driver. Use in Stage 1 to confirm the target hardware string.

tools.name: check_docker
tools.description: Verify Docker is reachable + list running containers. Use in Stage 3-4 to ensure deployment can proceed.
